# enable-and-schemes

helm.enable and helm.valuesFileSchemes

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/helm/enable-and-schemes` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  helm.enable: "true"
  helm.valuesFileSchemes: http,https
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  repoServer:
    helm:
      enabled: true
      valuesFileSchemes:
      - http
      - https
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  helm.enable: "true"
  helm.valuesFileSchemes: http,https
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml

  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
```
